final:
module comparator_32bit (
    input [31:0] obf_A,
    input [31:0] B,
    output reg [1:0] result
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (obf_A < B) begin
            result = 2'b00; // obf_A < B
        end else if (obf_A == B) begin
            result = 2'b01; // obf_A == B
        end else begin
            result = 2'b10; // obf_A > B
        end
    end
endmodule
